name: PH Energy Intelligence Map
description: Real-time intelligence dashboard for the Philippine oil supply chain

apis.description: Live oil price benchmarks — Brent crude, Dubai crude, MOPS gasoline/diesel, PHP/USD forex, pump prices
Aggregated Philippine energy news from RSS feeds with severity ratings
NLP sentiment analysis of energy headlines
API discovery endpoint — returns this manifest's API section as JSON

datasets.name: Philippine Gas Stations
datasets.description: 10,469 gas stations from OpenStreetMap with brand, coordinates, fuel types, region classification, and operational status tracking
datasets.source: OpenStreetMap Overpass API + DOE Downstream Oil Monitoring

datasets.name: Oil Supply Chain Infrastructure
datasets.description: Refineries, import terminals, and fuel depots across the Philippines

phases.title: Philippines Foundation
phases.summary: Live oil price feeds, 10K gas stations, RSS news, scenario planning

phases.title: Philippine Data Enrichment
phases.summary: DOE actual pump prices, Google Places station photos, historical charts, weather disruption

phases.title: ASEAN Expansion
phases.summary: Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand markets, Malacca Strait ship tracking

phases.title: Global Energy Intelligence
phases.summary: Chokepoint monitoring, OPEC production, refinery utilization, sanctions mapping

data_source_upgrades: AIS ship tracking for tanker movements
